MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Sally Gratz for Public Guardian.

Ms. Gratz requested a 45-day continuance stating that she is going to do a petition to terminate and that all of the funds are gone. Status on filing of the fourth account is continued to December 9, 2019 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: C. Kabasares. Not reported.
